subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord of existence and Sovereign of kings, the Merciful unto them that are in bondage! This servant hath turned toward Thy gate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الوجود و سلطان الملوک و راحم المملوک هذا مملوک توجه الی بابک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
